tasks.goal: Improve API retry handling for transient failures and rate limits.
current_context: The current client already retries transient failures with fixed delay.
Avoid selecting another note that repeats the fixed-delay policy.

candidates.text: Improve API retry handling for transient failures with fixed delay.
Exponential backoff with jitter reduces rate-limit collisions during retries.
Capture request IDs in logs for easier debugging.

tasks.notes: Baseline should prefer the repeated fixed-delay phrasing while Psi0 should reward the more novel improvement.

tasks.goal: Improve cache invalidation strategy after product price updates.
current_context: The current system already does TTL-only cache expiry after price updates.

candidates.text: Improve cache invalidation after price updates with TTL-only expiry.
Publish price-change events so caches can invalidate keys immediately.
Track cache hit rate on the pricing dashboard.

tasks.notes: The task is framed around improvement, so repeating TTL-only should be penalized as redundant.

tasks.goal: Plan a safer user table schema migration with minimal downtime.
current_context: The current migration note recommends blocking writes during the schema change.

candidates.text: Plan the schema migration with a blocking write window during deployment.
Use an expand-contract migration so reads and writes remain online.
Remove unused database indexes after the migration.

tasks.notes: Psi0 should favor the novel safer pattern over the already-known blocking approach.

tasks.goal: Design a safer feature flag rollout for the new checkout flow.
current_context: The current rollout plan already enables the flag for everyone at once.

candidates.text: Design the checkout rollout by enabling the flag for everyone at once.
Use a percentage rollout with guardrail metrics before full exposure.
Update the checkout help text before launch.

tasks.notes: A progressive rollout is the novel safety lever; the global rollout note repeats the current plan.

tasks.goal: Improve the incident response playbook for database failover events.
current_context: The current playbook already says to restart application servers during failover.

candidates.text: Improve the failover playbook by restarting application servers during failover.
Add a temporary read-only mode so writes pause cleanly during failover.
Standardize incident tags for reporting.

tasks.notes: The new guardrail changes behavior; the restart note just repeats current context.

tasks.goal: Improve customer record deduplication before CRM imports.
current_context: The current import note already uses exact email match for deduplication.

candidates.text: Improve CRM deduplication by using exact email match before imports.
Combine email, company, and normalized phone signals to catch near-duplicates.
Sort CSV rows before import for easier debugging.

tasks.notes: The new candidate adds missing recall while the old note only restates exact-match behavior.

tasks.goal: Improve log retention for security investigations.
current_context: The current retention policy already keeps logs for seven days.

candidates.text: Improve log retention by keeping application logs for seven days.
Keep searchable summaries hot and archive raw logs for ninety days.
Pretty-print JSON logs for local development.

tasks.notes: Baseline should overvalue wording overlap while Psi0 should surface the more novel retention change.

tasks.goal: Improve search ranking for documentation queries.
current_context: The current search note already ranks results only by keyword frequency.

candidates.text: Improve search ranking by using keyword frequency for documentation queries.
Blend keyword ranking with click feedback to promote actually useful docs.
Update the documentation site theme colors.

tasks.notes: This is a pure redundancy test: same goal words versus a more useful but slightly more novel candidate.

tasks.goal: Improve webhook delivery reliability for third-party integrations.
current_context: The current webhook note already retries failed deliveries three times without jitter.

candidates.text: Improve webhook delivery by retrying failed deliveries three times.
Store exhausted webhook events in a dead-letter queue for recovery.
Add a webhook filter to the admin console.

tasks.notes: The useful candidate introduces recovery behavior instead of repeating the current retry count.

tasks.goal: Improve the model evaluation set for support ticket triage.
current_context: The current evaluation note already samples only easy resolved tickets.

candidates.text: Improve the evaluation set by sampling easy resolved support tickets.
Add ambiguous and long-tail tickets so hard negatives are represented.
Shorten the model system prompt for lower latency.

tasks.notes: Psi0 should prefer the candidate that changes the evaluation set, not the one that repeats an existing bias.

tasks.goal: Prepare an executive status brief for launch risks and mitigations.
current_context: The current draft already says the launch schedule is tight and dependencies are cross-team.

candidates.text: The executive status brief should mention schedule pressure and cross-team dependencies.
QA automation gaps and vendor lead times are the main risks; weekly burn-down is the mitigation.
The launch review meeting moved from Tuesday to Wednesday.

tasks.notes: A good brief needs the missing mitigation detail, not more repetition of known schedule risk.

tasks.goal: Synthesize notes for a memo on why retrieval fails under redundancy.
current_context: The current memo already argues that semantic similarity alone retrieves repetitive evidence.

candidates.text: The memo should explain that semantic similarity alone retrieves repetitive evidence.
Redundant retrieval wastes token budget and crowds out information gain.
The retrieval prototype started as a late-night draft.

tasks.notes: This realistic synthesis task rewards the missing consequence rather than the already-stated premise.

tasks.goal: Prepare review notes for a pull request improving background job safety.
current_context: The current review notes already mention that the job retries with fixed delay.

candidates.text: The review should mention that the background job retries with fixed delay.
The more important review note is missing idempotency checks around repeated execution.
Rename the temporary variable for readability.

tasks.notes: The useful context adds a new failure mode instead of echoing the already-observed retry behavior.

tasks.goal: Select the best notes for a roadmap discussion on analytics reliability.
current_context: The current roadmap context already says dashboards are flaky because upstream jobs fail silently.

candidates.text: Roadmap notes should say dashboards are flaky because upstream jobs fail silently.
Data contracts and freshness alerts are the concrete reliability investments missing from the roadmap.
Refresh chart colors for the analytics interface.

tasks.notes: The realistic planning task needs actionable investments, not another restatement of the known symptom.
